name: Attio CRM
description: your Attio CRM data through natural language querie
longDescription: Comprehensive Attio CRM MCP server providing complete CRM surface coverage. Manage Companies, People, Deals, Tasks, Lists, Records, and Notes. Supports advanced filtering, relationship search, batch operations, and workspace member management.
author: ai.smithery
examplePrompts: Search for all companies in my Attio workspace
Find all people who work at Tech Corp
Show me recent activity on the enterprise pipeline
Add a note to this contact about today's meeting
